title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The cliffs of the headland curve away to the north.  Powerful currents swirl and spiral crazily, making any movement to the north or west impossible.  A low dip in the headland reveals a tall, pale tower, which has a ghostly gleam in the moonlight.

The cliffs of the headland curve away to the north.  Powerful currents swirl and spiral crazily, making any movement to the north or west impossible.  A low dip in the headland reveals a tall, pale tower, which gleams whitely in the sunlight.
paths: Obvious paths: southeast, south, southwest, down

wayto.11441: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'south' else move 'swim south' end; waitrt?
wayto.11443: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southwest' else move 'swim southwest' end; waitrt?
wayto.11453: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southeast' else move 'swim southeast' end; waitrt?

timeto.11485: ;e ((!defined?(Skills) or !defined?(Skills.climbing) or (defined?(Skills) and defined?(Skills.climbing) and Skills.climbing > 14)) ? 0.2 : nil)
